steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The question asks for a generalization specifically about rails-with-trails — the category defined as trails sharing a right-of-way with an active rail line.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B generalizes specifically about rails-with-trails by comparing them to other types of railway trails, concluding they're less common based on the 400 vs. 2,000+ comparison in the notes.

The other three either focus on the wrong category, mention both types without singling out rails-with-trails, or state a specific fact rather than a generalization.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
